TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking V3 Receipt and Ticket Stub in the World of Tomoe Minai.
changeReason: "Ticket" changed to "Ticket Stub" — a ticket stub is a used/torn portion of a ticket, which is a different object than a full ticket and implies the ticket has already been used.
